description: Shared external tools for ML model building (PyTorch, ONNX, Transformers). Canonical schema: each entry pins a single `version` and, for pip packages, declares `packageManager: "pip"` so loadPythonVersions picks them up.

python3.description: Python 3 interpreter (required for all ML tools)
python3.notes: Pin matches the canonical build-infra python (3.11 floor; 3.13.1 on macOS via brew). The host package manager may resolve a nearby version on Linux (apt: 3.10.12) and Windows (choco: 3.13.1) — these are informational only; the scripts probe with getPythonCommand() at runtime.

onnxscript.description: ONNX Script for model authoring and export
